cast.name: 路易丝·拉贝克 Louise Labeque
爱德华·苏皮斯 Édouard Sulpice
让-雨果·安格拉德 Jean-Hugues Anglade

introduction: Johanna is a sous-chef in a Michelin-starred kitchen. Amandine ditched business school to become a waitress. Vivian dreams of becoming a food critic. Together, they’re young, ambitious, and ready to make their mark in Parisian gastronomy.But amidst discrimination, humiliation, and an elitist, misogynistic, and toxic environment, their dream turns into a battle. Refusing to bow to the system, they decide to fight back, breaking the rules and reimagining French cuisine as something freer, affordable, and unapologetically modern.Get ready for a high-speed plunge into the ruthless world of French fine dining, as three bold dreamers take on the establishment and aim to spark a culinary revolution.
